SEARCH
Module com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.user.impl
Package com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.party.impl

Class ViewRiksdagenPartyLongitudinalPerformance

java.lang.Object
com.hack23.cia.model.internal.application.data.party.impl.ViewRiksdagenPartyLongitudinalPerformance
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.io.Serializable
@Entity public class ViewRiksdagenPartyLongitudinalPerformance extends java.lang.Object implements java.io.Serializable
The Class ViewRiksdagenPartyLongitudinalPerformance. Database view for party performance tracking across election cycles with semester granularity.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Constructor Summary

    Description
    ViewRiksdagenPartyLongitudinalPerformance()
    Instantiates a new view riksdagen party longitudinal performance.
